TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al_Attles, title = Al_Attles, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Attles} }

S.FORM: Al Attles sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 11, Al Attles, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na sraral Al Attles masot hopa pqwasan biru lga, magan wagiq blaq na pqwasan biru. pinqbaqan nya Al Attles mqwas biru sa Weequahic pqwsan biru seneng, Newark, New Jersey, U.S. Al Attles, t'aring kawas tay 1956 tehuk kawas tay 1960, mqwas biru sa North Carolina A&T pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Attles hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. t'aring sa kawas 1960, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Al Attles sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 11, Al Attles, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na sraral Al Attles masot hopa pqwasan biru lga, magan wagiq blaq na pqwasan biru. pinqbaqan nya Al Attles mqwas biru sa Weequahic pqwsan biru seneng, Newark, New Jersey, U.S. Al Attles, t'aring kawas tay 1956 tehuk kawas tay 1960, mqwas biru sa North Carolina A&T pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Attles hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy. t'aring sa kawas 1960, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al attles~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, al attles~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na s~ɕraral al attles~ɕ mas~ɕot ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa, maɣan waɣiq βlaq na pqwas~ɕan βiru. pinqβaqan nja al attles~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa weequaħiʦ~ʨ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, newark, new *ers~ɕej, u.s~ɕ. al attles~ɕ, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina a&t pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al attles~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
